readingList.about: Books I have finished or am working through, read in physical copies before bed. Mostly mystery and faith, with the odd novel Pat talks me into.

book.title: The Harbor Watch
book.author: Reginald Coyle
book.note: Slow burn detective story set on a cold coast. Stayed up too late on a work night for it.

book.title: Quiet Mornings, Steady Faith
book.author: Naomi Pruett
book.note: Short daily readings. A good start before the medications and the coffee.

book.title: The Long Shift
book.author: Delia Hollis
book.note: A nurse narrator, which is either a comfort or a busman's holiday, not sure yet.

book.title: Cold River Crossing
book.author: Ellis Grant
book.note: Fast chapters, good for the nights the hands ache and sleep is slow.

book.title: The Gardener's Quiet Year
book.author: Marcus Vance
book.note: A gift from Kayla. Saving it for spring when the pots go back out.

book.title: Still Waters Run
book.author: Caroline Webb
book.note: Read it over the holidays last year. The kind of book you press on a friend.

preferences.when: thirty minutes before lights out, most nights
